name: Cucumber Shrimp Spread
directions: Combine all ingredients and mix well; serve with crackers.
The Cucumber Shrimp Spread is a great appetizer.
The cucumber adds freshness and crunch and works well with the cream cheese and shrimp.

name: Smoked Oyster Spread
directions: Thouroughly combien first 6 ingredients.
Gently blend in chopped oysters.
Cover and chill several hours.
Serve with Melba toast or crisp crackers.

name: Salmon-Cream Cheese Pate
directions: Mince onion in food processor.
Add remaining ingredients.
Blend with off/on turns then let run until smooth.
Refrigerate overnight.
Good with raw vegetables, crackers or Melba toast.
Can also shape and cover with parsley or chopped nuts.

name: Shrimp Appy
directions: Mix together first 4 ingredients.
Chill 1 hour.
Blend next 3 ingredients.
Spread on toast or crackers.
Top each with a shrimp.
Garnish with parsley.
Chill.

name: Shrimp Cocktail Cracker Spread
directions: Mix ketchup& horseradish.
Drain shrimp and rinse in cold water.
Mix shrimp& ketchup mixture.
Lay cream cheese out on a nice plate.
Top with shrimp and sauce.
Serve with crackers.
NOTE: Ketchup& horseradish mixed is a simple cocktail sauce for Shrimp Cocktail.

name: Indian Tuna Salad
directions: Mix all ingredients except pine nuts and chill.
Stir in nuts just before serving.

name: Black Olive Pesto for Pizza
directions: Whirl all the ingredients together in a food processor.
Use as a base for pizza or as a dip.

name: Liverwurst Pate
directions: In a medium bowl, knead together liverwurst, garlic powder, basil and green onion.
Place on serving tray and form into mound or square.
Mix softened cream cheese, garlic powder, hot sauce and mayonnaise and frost the liverwurst stuff.
Garnish with something appropriate to the occasion and serve with pumpernickel bread.

similar.name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese

name: Salmon Pate' Ala Villani
directions: In a mixing bowl, mix together salmon, cream cheese, liquid smoke, fresh lemon juice, Tabasco sauce, onion and salt; mix well.
Adjust seasonings to taste.
Transfer to a smaller bowl, cover and refrigerate to chill, about 1 hour or longer.
When chilled, roll mixture into a ball.
Roll the ball in finely chopped parsley until coated.
Transfer ball to a serving plate.
Serve with an assortment of crackers or potato chips.
Refrigerate any unused portion.
Freshly cooked salmon can also be used.
If desired, use 6 green onions finely chopped instead of the regular onion.

name: Simply Sardine Pate
directions: Blend or process sardines, eggs, butter, mayo, lemon and mustard until smooth Stir in celery and scallions and chill.

name: Amish Peanut Butter
directions: In a mixing bowl, stir all the ingredients together till combined.
Place in a covered container.
Store in refrigerator.
Bring to room temperature to serve as a bread spread or ice cream topper.

similar.name: Peanutty  Chocolate Spread on Vanilla Wafers

name: Tuna or Crab meat Dip
directions: In a small bowl, mix cream cheese and sour cream until smooth.
Add the rest of the ingredients and mix well.
Taste, and adjust seasonings to your preference.
Chill well before serving.
Serve with crackers or small slices of (pumpernickle) bread.

name: El Ranch-o Dressing
directions: Combine the buttermilk, lime juice, cilantro, oregano, onion, garlic, salt and pepper and whisk to combine.
Add the mayonnaise and whisk until smooth.
Cover and refridgerate for 1 hour to develop flavours.
The dressing will keep for up to a week in an airtight container.

name: Curried Turkey Pate
directions: Position knife blade in food processor bowl; add first 5 ingredients, and process until smooth.
Line a deep 4-cup bowl with heavy-duty plastic wrap, allowing plastic wrap to extend over edges of bowl.
Spoon turkey mixture into bowl; cover with plastic wrap, pressing to pack.
Chill 2 hours.

name: shrimp spread
directions: Mix the first 3 ingredients together.
Spread over a 12 inch pizza pan.
Scatter shrimp over mixture.
Add a layer of seafood sauce, mozzarella cheese, green pepper, onions and tomato.
Cover and chill until ready to serve.
Supply with assorted crackers.

name: Crab Dip
directions: Beat the cream cheese, dressing and milk in a bowl until well blended.
Stir in the crabmeat, chopped red pepper, lemon juice and parsley.
Cover and refrigerate.

name: Savoury Artichoke Dip
directions: Mix all the ingredients together until well blended.
Cover and refrigerate.

similar.name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese

name: Party Spread in a Snap
directions: Remove cream cheese from wrapper and place on a plate.
Dump shrimp all over top, letting some spill over.
Pour cocktail sauce over all.
Serve with crackers.
No need for spreading utensils.
Once the cream cheese softens a bit, it yields to the crackers.

name: Simple Peanut Butter Spread
directions: Mash together tofu and peanut butter until mixture is as uniform as possible.
Mix in honey.
Spread and enjoy.

similar.name: Peanutty  Chocolate Spread on Vanilla Wafers

name: Salmon Ball
directions: After deboning and draining the salmon, mix together the first 6 ingredients.
Form into a ball.
Roll into the corflake crumbs.
Chill, over night is best.
Serve with crackers.

name: Cinnamon Honey Spread
directions: Mix all ingredients in a small bowl.
Beat until smooth.

similar.name: Yummy Cinnamon & Brown Sugar Cream Cheese

name: Green Goddess Dressing, non fat
directions: Mix the mayo, sour cream, and vinegar.
Stir in the anchovy paste, if using it.
Use kitchen shears to snip the parsley, chives, and cilantro (if using it) into tiny bits.
Stir the herbs into the dressing mix.
Season with salt and pepper.
Let chill overnight before using.

name: Thousand Island Dressing, Low Fat
directions: Mix the above ingredients.
Chill for a minimum of 2 hours before using.

name: Orange - Pecan Spread
directions: Mix all three ingredients well.
Chill.
Great to serve on bagels, waffles, and English muffins!

similar.name: Peanutty  Chocolate Spread on Vanilla Wafers

name: Curry Apple Tuna Salad
ingredients: solid white tuna packed in water
directions: Mix tuna, apples and walnuts with a fork in a medium bowl.
Add mustard and mayonnaise to taste (amounts are suggestions).
Shake in curry powder and mix.

name: Slaw Dressing
directions: put sweet and low, milk, and mayo in jar and shake to mix and pour over slaw mixture and cool.

similar.name: Quicker than the Quickest Coleslaw Dressing

name: Homemade Avocado Dip for 8 People
directions: Place all ingredients into blender or food processor and blend until combined.

Serve with Dip accompaniments such as these: Raw vegetables, (try carrot sticks, green beans, snow peas (remove strings), zucchini and celery. Broccoli, cauliflower and asparagus can be dropped into boiling water for 1 minute, drained and then rinsed under the cold tap to keep them crisp.) Rice crackers or thin wafer crackers.
Rye bread cut into small triangles or squares.
Pitta bread (spray with olive oil, sprinkle with poppy and sesame seeds and bake in the oven until crisp).

name: Sugar Cinnamon Butter
directions: Beat all ingredients until fluffy.
Chill.
Serve with quick breads, toast, pancakes, waffles etc.

similar.name: Yummy Cinnamon & Brown Sugar Cream Cheese

name: Avocado Spread
directions: Slice avocado lengthwise, remove pit.
Scoop pulp into bowl; mash well.
Add all other ingredients; mix well.
Fill shells with mixture.

name: Ham And Olive Spread
directions: Mix all ingredients well.
Use as a spread on toast bits or crackers.

name: Red Pepper Hummus
directions: Put all of the ingredients in food processor or blender and blend until smooth.
Store the hummus in a tightly sealed container.
Hummus will keep in the refrigerator for 2  3 days.
Serve as a dip with fresh veggies or on pita bread.

name: Braunschweiger Salad Spread
directions: Mix all ingredients in food processor till smooth.
Use on bread to make sandwich or use on crackers like a dip.

similar.name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese

name: Curried Cheese Ball
directions: Mix top seven ingredients well.
Pat into two balls.
Refrigerate.
Pour chutney over top prior to serving.
Serve with assorted crackers.
(One ball can be nicely frozen and served at a later time if desired.).

name: Crabmeat Spread
directions: Cut garlic clove in half and rub all over inside part of mixing bowl you will use to make the crab spread.
Combine cream cheese and milk till smooth.
Add remaining ingredients and mix well.
Serve on Ritz or any butter cracker.

name: Quicker than the Quickest Coleslaw Dressing
directions: Whisk together all ingredients.
Keep in refrigerator until needed.

name: Smoked Fish Pate
directions: Remove skin and bones from fish and separate into individual flakes with a fork.
Mix cream cheese, lemon juice, and onion.
Whip until smooth and fluffy.
Add fish and parsley and mix.
Chill for 1 hour.
Serve with assorted crackers.

name: Spicy Cream Cheese Spread
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in a small bowl, stirring until blended.
Spoon into an airtight container; cover and chill for at least 8 hours.
Put into a serving dish and sprinkle with paprika.
Serve with pita chips.

name: Herb and Pepper Cheese Spread
directions: Combine all ingredients except bell pepper in a large mixing bowl; beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until smooth.
Stir in bell pepper pieces.
Refrigerate for 6 hours or overnight.
Take out of refrigerator and soften a bit before serving.
Put into a bell pepper and serve with crackers.

similar.name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese

name: Sun-Dried Tomato and Cheese Spread
directions: Drain tomatoes, reserving 2 T marinade.
Set aside 1/4 C tomatoes, reserve remaining tomatoes and marinade for another use.
Position knife blade in food processor bowl; add 1/4 C tomatoes, 2T marinade, cream cheese, and next three ingredients.
Pulse 6 times or until well blended.
Spoon mixture into a small bowl; cover and chill thoroughly.
Let spread come to room temperature before serving.
Garnish with fresh basil sprig.

similar.name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese

name: Creamy Italian Cucumber/ Rye Bread Spread
directions: Slice the cucmber into thin slices and set aside.
Allow cream cheese to come to soften and then mix the dry italian dressing mix into the softened cream cheese.
Refreigerate for 1 hour to allow the flavors to blend.
Spread 1 tsp of cream cheese mix onto a slice of party rye and top with a cucumber.
Bet you can't eat just one!

similar.name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese

name: Peanut Butter Fruit Dip
directions: Mix together until smooth.
Dip apples, pears, graham crackers, strawberries, marshmallows etc.

similar.name: Peanutty  Chocolate Spread on Vanilla Wafers

name: crab mousse
directions: mix cream cheese, mayo, mustard, horseradish, onions and spices until smooth fold in crab.
spoon into endive spears or onto crackers.
you may use a pastry bag if desired.

name: Tuna Mousse
directions: Flake tuna well and add mayo, tomato paste, and salt and pepper.
Best if you mix in the food processor.
Mix gelatin and boiling water.
Add to tuna mixture, mixing well.
Place in pretty bowl or fits perfectly in Tupperware mini jello mold.
Refrigerate overnight.
Turn out of mold onto bed of lettuce.
Goes great with crackers or bread.

name: Jalapeno Cheese
directions: Place macadamia nuts, Rejuvelac or filtered water, salt, turmeric,sun-dried tomatoes and lemon juice in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Add pine nuts and blend until smooth.
Stir in the jalapeño peppers.

similar.name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese

name: Macadamia Pine Nut Cheese
directions: Place macadamia nuts, Rejuvelac or filtered water, salt, and lemon.
juice in blender and blend until smooth.
Add pine nuts and blend until smooth.
Place in a dish in dehydrator and dehydrate for 6-8 hours until it resembles cream cheese or ricotta cheese.
Stir several times during dehydration, as a crust will form on top.

name: Sunflower Pate
directions: Place garlic in food processor and process well.
Add sunflower seeds, Nama Shoyu, lemon juice, tahini, and cumin powder to processor and process until smooth.

name: Fresh Herb Butter
directions: Combine all ingredients well.
Serve as an hors d' ouevre on freshly baked bread.

similar.name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese

name: Easy cream cheese dip/ball/chunk/whatever-you-want-2-call-it.
directions: Cut off a good size chunk of cream cheese& put it in a bowl.
Pour desired amount of salsa on to the cream cheese.
Spread the dip on the chip, or just dip the chip in.
Enjoy!

name: Tapenade
directions: Mix the first seven ingredients in a blender.
Gradually pour in the olive oil while the blender is mixing.
Continue until Tapenade has pasty consistency.
Spread on pita bread,or stuff endive, or on grilled crusty bread.

similar.name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese

name: Low-Fat Tuna Salad Spread
directions: Mix above ingredients together.
Use it as a spread on sandwiches, crackers, etc.

name: smoked oyster spread
directions: Mix cream cheese with heavy cream until well blended and smooth.
Add remaining ingredients and mix well.
Serve with assorted crackers, breads and/or veggie sticks.

name: Lighter Hummus
directions: Using food processor, combine chickpeas, yogurt, tahini, lemon juice, cumin and garlic.
Process until the mixture is smooth.
Add parsley and continue processing until parsley is finely chopped.
Place in covered serving dish and refrigerate for a few hours.
Serve with pita bread or crackers, or use as a sandwich spread.

name: Yummy Cinnamon & Brown Sugar Cream Cheese
directions: Whip up cream cheese to help soften.
Add brown sugar, sugar and cinnamon.
Remember you can add less or more until you get that certain taste you are looking for.
Whip together and store in a sealable container for storage in the fridge.

similar.name: Peanutty  Chocolate Spread on Vanilla Wafers

name: Amy's Beer & Ranch Cheese Ball
directions: Reserve one cup of cheese.
In a medium bowl, combine remaining ingredients (I use a hand mixer to make sure it's combined well).
Push mixture together in the center of the bowl, making a ball shape, cover bowl, and refrigerate 2 hours or longer.
Place a large strip of plastic wrap on the counter top.
Sprinkle remaining cup of cheese over the center of the plastic wrap.
Place cream cheese mixture in the center of the shredded cheese, and use plastic wrap to mold into a ball.
Roll the ball to completely cover in shredded cheese.
(I often use more than one cup of cheese to completely cover the cheese ball).
Wrap the formed cheese ball in plastic wrap and refrigerate one hour or until serving.
Serve with hearty crackers such as Wheat Thins or Triscuits.

name: "Sour Cream" Avocado Dip (vegan)
directions: Peel and pit avocado, put in a LARGE mixing bowl (dip is a bit splattery when blending).
Add entire block of tofu and salsa.
Combine ingredients using a hand mixer on medium speed for about 1 minute or until the mixture becomes smooth.
Add remaining ingredients, mix on low speed until all ingredients are blended together.
Chill for one hour and serve.
Store leftovers in the fridge in an air-tight container.

name: Two Bean Chipotle Hummus
directions: Place garlic, chipotle pepper, lemon juice, and tahini in a food processor or mini chopper.
Pulse until chopped.
Add in beans and pulse, adding in a little water at a time until it reaches the smoothness you like.
Stir in pepper and paprika, and refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Peanutty  Chocolate Spread on Vanilla Wafers
directions: In a medium bowl combine peanut butter,yogurt, chocolate syrup and vanilla extract. Stir well.
Spread the chocolate spread on the flat side of wafers and top with another wafer.
Serve with your choice of sliced fruits,.
such as pineapple chunks, sliced strawberries,bananas and/or apples.

similar.name: Creamy Italian Cucumber/ Rye Bread Spread

name: Yummilicious Cilantro Garlic Hummus
directions: Place garlic in food processor and finely chop.
Place remaining ingredients (wet last) in the food processor with the garlic and process until mixture forms a paste.
Enjoy!

name: Elephant Garlic Butter
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients and mix until smooth using a blender or food processor.  Toss in zest and parsley. Wrap the butter in plastic wrap, forming a roll, and keep in the freezer.

name: Wasabi Herbed Mayonnaise
directions: Mix all ingredients and enjoy!

name: Super Simple Olive Dip
directions: Open and drain the cans of olives.
Put the olives in a blender.
Peel the garlic and put in the blender.  You can use more or less, depending on your garlic tolerance.
Pour in the olive oil and begin blending.  I have never actually measured the amount of olive oil - just add it until the olives blend easily.
Blend well and enjoy!

name: Cooling Zesty Dressing/Marinade/Dip
directions: Place all ingredients into blender and blend till smooth.

similar.name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese

name: Layered Artichoke Spread
directions: In a bowl,mix the cream cheese and ranch dressing packet well.
Chop the artichokes roasted red peppers and parsley. Add to cream cheese mix.

Line your bowl with plastic wrap as smoothly as possible.  Layer ingredients in following order:  1/3 cream cheese, half of artichoke mixture, 1/3 cream cheese, other half of artichoke mixture, and last 1/3 of cream cheese.  Spread each addition into a smooth layer.  Cover top with plastic wrap and place in refridgerator for 8 hours.
To serve, remove plastic wrap from top.  Invert the mold onto your serving dish. Remove the bottom layer of plastic wrap.  Use a table knife to smooth out the mold's appearance.
Serve with crackers around the mold on the platter.

similar.name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese

name: Honey Cream Cheese Fruit Dip
directions: Blend ingredients together until smooth.
Vary amount of milk according to desired consistency.
Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Spanish Olive and Molasses Spread
directions: In a blender or food processor, process the olives, bread crumbs, capers and garlic on low speed until pulverized into a mixture that loosely holds together. Do not puree.
Transfer to a bowl, and stir in the molasses and pepper.

name: Borlotti and Sage Dip
directions: Mash the Borlotti beans, adding olive oil half way through the process.
Add the sesame oil, sage, and semi-dried tomatoes and mix thoroughly.

name: Cucumber Slices Topped With Herbed Cream Cheese
directions: Process or blend 1st 8 ingredients together until smooth.
Cut cucumber into 5mm slices and top with cheese mixture.
Garnish with extra oregano and red pepper pieces.
Note: Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving. This time is not included in the preparation time.

similar.name: Creamy Italian Cucumber/ Rye Bread Spread

name: Dill Pickle Boats
directions: cut each pickle in halves lenghtwise.
use a small spoon to scoop out the flesh from center of pickles (reserve flesh).
chop reserved pickle flesh, mix with cheese, red peppers, parsley, mustard.
taste for salt and pepper.
spoon the cheese mixture back into the pickle halves, press down with spoon to mould in centre.
sprikle with paprika for garnish.

name: Landlocked Crab Dip
directions: Finely dice celery and green onion.
Add the rest of the ingredients.
Mix well.
Chill until ready to serve (we started eating it right away).

name: Fiesta Hummus
directions: Blend all three in food processor until spreading consistency.  Refrigerate for at least a couple hours to let flavors blend and settle.

name: Mj's Tasty Tofu Mayo
directions: Blend in processor till thick.  Refrigerate.

name: Best Vegan Mayo
directions: Blend in processor till thick.
Refrigerate.

name: Healthy Mayo
directions: Put the egg and flavorings into a blender or food processor, or beat with a whisk until fully combined.
Gradually add the yogurt with the machine running, or while beating. Continue until the mixture is thick and homogeneous.

Variations: Substitute ground ginger for mustard and use onion powder for the garlic powder. Add a tablespoon of any chopped fresh herb. Use pinch of ground turmeric to color. Add zest of one lemon to the mixture or add a tiny pinch of citric acid crystals.

name: Green Chili Spicy Cheeseball
directions: 1- Let cream cheese come to room temperature.
2- In bowl, combine all ingredients.
3- Blend well.
4- Place mixture on wax paper or plastic wrap.
5- Wrap and form into ball.
6- Chill for several hours or overnight.

name: Nif's Dilly Greek Yogurt Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients in a bowl and refrigerate for at least an hour.
Serve with pita chips or veggies.
